macro.title: Will the Fed really hike rates 3 times in 2026, per Bank of America?
macro.what: BofA forecasts three quarter-point Fed hikes in 2026, but market pricing and a 10-year yield near 4.51% argue for 0 to only one rate hike.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.
